query: SELECT id, bracketGameId, bracketRound, bracketRegion, bracketSlot, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, nextBracketGameId, nextBracketSlot, awayScore, homeScore, gameStatus FROM games WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND bracketRound = 'S16' ORDER BY bracketGameId;
